title: Moist Yourself
description: A quick and easy mod for Riptide users. Upon standing in a cauldron, you gain the "moist" effect, which acts like rain.
body:
### New Effect: **Moist**

This mod introduces a new effect called **"Moist"**, which you are inflicted with for a few minutes after standing in a water cauldron. 

The **Moist** effect is designed primarily for players who use the **Riptide** enchantment to travel over long distances. Its sole function is to allow you to use a **Riptide Trident** when it isn't raining.
